name: bug-bounty
description: Dispute resolution for bug bounty programs — severity disputes, reproducibility, and disclosure compliance

rules.condition:
bug_is_reproducible == true AND
severity_meets_threshold == true AND
disclosure_compliant == true
rules.ruling_template:
Bug report validated. Bug is reproducible with {actual_severity} severity.
Disclosure followed program rules.
Full bounty payout is owed.

rules.condition:
bug_is_reproducible == true AND
severity_meets_threshold == false AND
actual_severity != null AND
disclosure_compliant == true
rules.ruling_template:
Bug is reproducible but severity is disputed.
Evaluated severity: {actual_severity}.
Adjusted payout based on actual severity.

Bug could not be reproduced after {reproduction_attempts} attempts.
Report does not meet reproducibility standard.
No payout is owed unless new evidence is provided.

Bug is valid but disclosure rules were violated.
Payout reduced or denied per program terms.

Reproducibility is disputed and cannot be determined from evidence.
Recommend technical review or third-party verification.
